prompt_summary: Write a program that searches job listings on LinkedIn
response: Built linkedin_jobs.py using LinkedIn's guest API endpoint to scrape public job listings. Includes HTML parsing with HTMLParser and CLI with argparse for keywords/location/limit.

prompt_summary: Build the Indeed API first
response: Created indeed_jobs.py using python-jobspy library which handles Indeed scraping. CLI supports keywords/location/results/hours/job_type/remote/country/save-to-csv options.

prompt_summary: Put the code files in SearchCode folder
response: Moved linkedin_jobs.py and indeed_jobs.py into SearchCode/ folder using smartRelocate.

prompt_summary: Upgrade my Python
response: Provided instructions for upgrading Python on Windows via official installer winget or pyenv-win. Cannot execute system installs directly.

prompt_summary: Check code for Python 3.14 compatibility
response: Researched Python 3.14 breaking changes. Updated Optional[str] to str | None syntax. Confirmed all code is compatible with 3.14.

prompt_summary: Modify Indeed search to use country JSON or single country flag
response: Added countries.json config file and updated indeed_jobs.py to search multiple countries from JSON or single country via --country flag. Added deduplication by URL.

prompt_summary: Ensure all English-speaking countries are in the list
response: Updated countries.json with USA UK Canada Australia Ireland New Zealand Singapore South Africa Nigeria Philippines India Pakistan Hong Kong - all supported by JobSpy.

prompt_summary: Write the command line to search for Director of Software Engineering
response: Provided: python SearchCode/indeed_jobs.py 'Director of Software Engineering' with variations for location/type/save/remote.

prompt_summary: Is there a licensed way to search Indeed and get more than 10 per country
response: Researched Indeed API status - old Publisher API deprecated partner API is enterprise-only. Recommended Adzuna API (free 250 req/day) as best alternative.

prompt_summary: Build the Adzuna API version
response: Created adzuna_jobs.py with .env credentials country code mapping multi-country search pagination salary filters sort options and CSV export. Free tier gives 50 results per country.

prompt_summary: Create a SQLite database and write results there with unique ID and dates
response: Created db.py with searches and job_listings tables. Added init_db save_search save_jobs functions. Integrated into adzuna_jobs.py with INSERT OR IGNORE for deduplication.

prompt_summary: Install SQLite CLI
response: Provided winget install SQLite.SQLite and choco install sqlite commands. Also showed Python alternative for querying without CLI.

prompt_summary: Find SQLite in system PATH
response: Found SQLite at C:\\Users\\lex\\AppData\\Local\\Microsoft\\WinGet\\Packages\\SQLite.SQLite_Microsoft.Winget.Source_8wekyb3d8bbwe from systempath.txt.

prompt_summary: Add SQLite to PowerShell profile
response: Provided instructions to add $env:PATH += sqlite path to $PROFILE file and reload with . $PROFILE.

prompt_summary: Show Python example to call the SQLite database
response: Provided multiple Python one-liners and examples using db.py query_jobs function for viewing/filtering/counting jobs.

prompt_summary: Create a React web page to display all results from SQLite
response: Created FastAPI backend (webapp/api/) and React frontend (webapp/client/) with Vite. Built JobTable Filters StatsBar components with pagination sorting and filtering.

prompt_summary: Use C# instead of Python for the API backend
response: Replaced FastAPI with ASP.NET Core minimal API (webapp/api_cs/). Created Program.cs with /jobs /countries /stats endpoints using Microsoft.Data.Sqlite. Builds on .NET 10.

prompt_summary: Fix OpenSSL configuration error for npm
response: PostgreSQL ODBC driver set OPENSSL_CONF to nonexistent file. Fix: $env:OPENSSL_CONF='' before npm commands or add to $PROFILE permanently.

prompt_summary: Fix API database path resolution error
response: Changed DB path from AppContext.BaseDirectory relative to Directory.GetCurrentDirectory() relative. Path resolves correctly when running dotnet run from webapp/api_cs/.

prompt_summary: Add state column for US entries from Adzuna location data
response: Added city and state columns to job_listings. Parse Adzuna area array for US state. Created migrate_db.py to ALTER TABLE on existing DB.

prompt_summary: Delete first set of search results from database
response: Created delete_search.py script that lists searches by ID and deletes selected search + its job listings. Supports delete by ID or 'all'.

prompt_summary: Create application to import LinkedIn job links into jobs database
response: Created linkedin_import.py - accepts URLs via CLI or --file fetches public pages parses title/company/location/type/description saves to jobs.db with deduplication.

prompt_summary: Build second React page for pasting job links and importing them
response: Added job_links table POST/GET/DELETE /links endpoints. Built ImportLinks React page with URL input pending queue Run Import button that calls Python importer.

prompt_summary: Add Glassdoor and ZipRecruiter support to import page
response: Updated C# URL validation and React UI to accept glassdoor.com and ziprecruiter.com. Added parsers for both in linkedin_import.py. Added colour-coded badges.

prompt_summary: Fix import link page Could not reach API error
response: The job_links table didn't exist. Added CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS for all tables in C# startup so they're created automatically on every boot.

prompt_summary: Fix no such table job_links error
response: Same root cause - added auto-creation of job_links table in Program.cs startup initCmd block.

prompt_summary: Fix Run Import button disabled after failure
response: Fixed React processLinks to properly reset processing state in finally block. Added reset-all and per-row reset endpoints. Links only marked processed on success.

prompt_summary: Fix Process failed - no module bs4
response: beautifulsoup4 not installed under Python 3.14. Provided pip install commands for py -3.14.

prompt_summary: Fix Python PATH - use py -3.14 in C# API
response: Changed ProcessStartInfo.FileName from 'python' to 'py' with '-3.14' argument prefix since python resolves to old 3.10 install.

prompt_summary: Fix no module requests error
response: requests not installed under Python 3.14. User ran py -3.14 -m pip install requests.

prompt_summary: Fix UnicodeEncodeError with checkmark character
response: Replaced unicode checkmark with 'OK:' text. Added sys.stdout.reconfigure(encoding='utf-8' errors='replace') at script top.

prompt_summary: Clean up ugly import success message - add progress spinner and status
response: Rewrote ImportLinks page with per-row progress tracking animated spinner (braille chars) green/red status indicators and Back to Queue button.

prompt_summary: Delete linked imports that failed (empty title/company/location)
response: Created delete_empty_jobs.py that removes job_listings with all empty title/company/location and resets job_links back to pending.

prompt_summary: Add delete button on job search results screen
response: Added DELETE /jobs/{id} endpoint. Added delete button column to JobTable component with immediate refresh on click.

prompt_summary: Fix LinkedIn scraping - use guest API endpoint
response: LinkedIn returns JS shell from main URL. Switched to /jobs-guest/jobs/api/jobPosting/{id} endpoint which returns server-rendered HTML with actual job data.

prompt_summary: Test LinkedIn guest API response for job data
response: Created test_fetch.py to verify guest API returns title company location. Confirmed: h2.top-card-layout__title and .topcard__flavor selectors work.

prompt_summary: Add source column (linkedin/indeed/adzuna etc)
response: Added source column to job_listings and db.py. Created add_source_column.py migration that back-fills based on URL patterns. Added Source column to React table.

prompt_summary: Add filters for each column on search results page
response: Added /sources /job-types /states API endpoints. Rebuilt Filters component with dropdowns for Source Country State Job Type Sort Order Per Page.

prompt_summary: Add editable country field for unknown countries
response: Added PATCH /jobs/{id}/country endpoint. Built CountryCell component with inline edit dropdown for Unknown/LinkedIn countries showing known country list.

prompt_summary: Add timezone column based on job location adjusted for EST
response: Created utils/timezone.js with country/state to IANA timezone mapping. Shows EST offset for each job location in the table.

prompt_summary: Put timezone in same column as location
response: Merged timezone into location cell as a blue sub-label showing EST offset. Removed separate Timezone column.

prompt_summary: Add Clear All button to Import Job Links page
response: Added DELETE /links/all endpoint. Added red Clear All Imported button with confirmation dialog to processed section.

prompt_summary: Add Useful Links page with new SQLite table
response: Created useful_links table with id/description/url/added_at. Added CRUD endpoints. Built UsefulLinks React page with add form inline edit and delete.

prompt_summary: Detect if LinkedIn job is remote
response: Added _detect_remote function checking job criteria elements description text and country-only location pattern. Added is_remote field to job dict.

prompt_summary: Test remote job detection on specific LinkedIn URL
response: Created test_fetch.py targeting job 4385168689. Found no explicit remote label - LinkedIn uses country-only location (United States) as remote indicator.

prompt_summary: Update remote detection for country-only location pattern
response: Updated _detect_remote to accept location parameter. Added check: if location has no comma and matches a country name it's Remote.

prompt_summary: Add is_remote column and migration script
response: Created add_remote_column.py migration. Added is_remote to db.py schema and save_jobs. Back-fills existing rows from description/location text.

prompt_summary: Write script to update remote status for all LinkedIn rows
response: Created update_remote_status.py that re-fetches each LinkedIn job via guest API runs detection logic and updates is_remote. Supports --dry-run and --id flags.

prompt_summary: Add remote/hybrid/on-site badge to Type column
response: Added colour-coded badge-remote next to job_type in table. Green for Remote orange for Hybrid blue for On-site.

prompt_summary: Stack Type field with remote badge below
response: Changed type-cell from horizontal flex to vertical flex-direction:column so job type appears above the remote badge.

prompt_summary: Make Job Type filter a multi-select with remote options
response: Added is_remote filter param to API. Built collapsible dropdown panel with Type radio buttons and Work Mode radio buttons. Click-outside-to-close.

prompt_summary: Add button to run Adzuna jobs pull from UI
response: Added POST /run-adzuna endpoint that executes adzuna_jobs.py. Built modal with keywords input Run Search button and output display. Auto-refreshes results.

prompt_summary: Add New badge for freshly imported jobs that fades after 10 minutes
response: Added isNew() function comparing searched_at to Date.now(). Orange pulsing New badge on source column. Component re-renders every minute to expire badges.

prompt_summary: Create Kanban board page with pipeline lanes
response: Created kanban_jobs table with status field. Built Kanban React page with 8 lanes card components with expand/move/notes. Auto-syncs missing kanban rows on load.

prompt_summary: Fix missing tiles in Searched/Found lane
response: API was returning 108 cards correctly. Fixed CSS - added min-height to board and proper overflow-y on lane bodies.

prompt_summary: Change Researched lane to Researching
response: Updated LANES and LANE_COLORS in Kanban.jsx. Created rename_lane.py migration script for existing DB rows.

prompt_summary: Make Kanban headers sticky while scrolling tiles
response: Set kanban-page to flex column with fixed height. Header flex-shrink:0 board flex:1 with overflow. Lane headers sticky within lanes.

prompt_summary: Fix tiles disappearing with sticky header layout
response: Added min-height:0 to flex children to allow shrinking below content size. Critical for enabling overflow scroll within flex containers.

prompt_summary: Move lane headers into page header
response: Separated lane headers into kanban-lane-headers-row in the sticky header. Board only contains card bodies. Added scroll sync via JS ref.

prompt_summary: Fix header/tile overlap and alignment issues
response: Removed sticky from lane headers. Let page scroll naturally with sticky page header only.

prompt_summary: Narrow gap between lanes and add separator lines
response: Set gap:0 on both header row and board. Added border-right:1px solid #dde1e7 to each lane for full-height separators.

prompt_summary: Fix separator line alignment with headers
response: Set gap:0 on header row to match board. Added box-sizing:border-box to lane headers. Lines now align perfectly.

prompt_summary: Add View Job link to collapsed tile
response: Added View link to kanban-card-badges row with margin-left:auto to push right. onClick stopPropagation prevents card expand.

prompt_summary: Collapse tile after saving notes
response: Added setExpanded(false) after successful note save in saveNotes function.

prompt_summary: Enable horizontal scrolling for all lanes
response: Added overflow-x:auto to .app:has(.kanban-page) and min-width:max-content to kanban-page.

prompt_summary: Fix horizontal scroll and sticky header conflict
response: Restructured to flex column layout. Header fixed height board fills remaining space with overflow-x/y:auto. Scroll sync via onScroll handler.

prompt_summary: Enable drag and drop on Kanban board
response: Added HTML5 drag/drop using draggable onDragStart onDragOver onDragEnter onDragLeave onDrop. Blue dashed outline on drop target. Saves immediately to DB.

prompt_summary: Add lane change history tracking table
response: Created kanban_history table. Log every status change in PATCH /kanban/{id}/status. Added History button on card with scrollable from/to/when entries.

prompt_summary: Fix history panel layout - stack From/To and When on two rows
response: Replaced table with stacked div entries. From arrow To on first line timestamp on second line in grey.

prompt_summary: Make history panel scrollable showing 3 moves max in reverse order
response: Changed API ORDER BY to DESC. Set max-height:138px on history panel for ~3 visible entries with scroll.

prompt_summary: Change Move To buttons to a dropdown
response: Replaced array of lane buttons with single select dropdown. Fires move immediately on change resets to placeholder after.

prompt_summary: Add Application Error lane
response: Added Application Error to LANES array with dark red colour #b71c1c.

prompt_summary: Add No Longer Accepting Applications lane
response: Added No Longer Accepting Applications to end of LANES with slate grey #546e7a.

prompt_summary: Combine rejection lanes into single Failed lane with fail_type
response: Merged 4 rejection lanes into Failed. Added fail_type column to kanban_jobs. Created fail type selector in expanded card. Migration script for existing rows.

prompt_summary: Fix no such column fail_type error
response: Migration script hadn't been run. Provided: python SearchCode/add_fail_type_column.py

prompt_summary: Show fail type dialog when moving tile to Failed
response: Added FailTypeDialog modal component. Intercepts moves to Failed lane (drag or dropdown). Must select reason before confirming. Saves fail_type to DB.

prompt_summary: Add Anonymize Companies toggle
response: Created utils/anonymize.js with deterministic hash-based fake company names. Added checkbox to header. JobTable uses co() wrapper on company column.

prompt_summary: Make anonymize work on Pipeline page too
response: Lifted anonymize state to App.jsx. Passed as prop to both JobSearch and Kanban. Added co() wrapper to card company display.

prompt_summary: Fix duplicate anonymize state declaration
response: Removed local useState for anonymize in JobSearch since it now comes as a prop from App.

prompt_summary: Move Rejected By Me into Failed lane
response: Removed from LANES added to FAIL_TYPES. Created migrate_rejected_by_me.py to update existing rows.

prompt_summary: Add star/focus selection for Searched/Found tiles
response: Added is_active column to kanban_jobs. POST /kanban/{id}/active toggles (clears others). Star button on Searched/Found cards. Orange border/glow on active.

prompt_summary: Fix no such column is_active error
response: Migration script needed: python SearchCode/add_active_column.py

prompt_summary: Clear active highlight when tile moves out of Searched/Found
response: Added check in PATCH status endpoint: if moving from Searched/Found to another lane set is_active=0.

prompt_summary: Fix drag and drop not functioning
response: Added onDragEnter and contains() check on onDragLeave to prevent flickering. Added e.preventDefault() on onDrop. Set dataTransfer data.

prompt_summary: Fix click on tile not working
response: Removed pointer-events:none on :active * which was blocking clicks on card children.

prompt_summary: Move notes to separate table with timestamps and scrollable feed
response: Created kanban_notes table with GET/POST/DELETE endpoints. Rebuilt card notes as scrollable feed with individual timestamps and delete buttons. Add via textarea.

prompt_summary: Add manual job entry page
response: Created POST /jobs/manual endpoint generating unique ID. Built AddJob React page with form fields for all columns. Auto-creates kanban card at Searched/Found.

prompt_summary: Fix LastInsertRowId compile error in C#
response: Replaced conn.LastInsertRowId with SELECT last_insert_rowid() query since Microsoft.Data.Sqlite doesn't expose that property directly.

prompt_summary: Create Dashboard page as default landing page
response: Built Dashboard with stat cards pipeline breakdown bar chart current focus card countries pills and recent activity table. Set as default tab.

prompt_summary: Remove Searches Run tile from dashboard
response: Removed the total_searches stat card from dash-cards section.

prompt_summary: Fix Applied count to use history (ever applied)
response: Added /stats/applied-count endpoint querying COUNT(DISTINCT kanban_id) from kanban_history WHERE to_status=Applied. Dashboard uses this instead of pipeline count.

prompt_summary: Add pie chart of application outcomes and failure reasons
response: Added /stats/outcomes endpoint. Built PieChart component with conic-gradient CSS and colour-coded legend showing counts and percentages.

prompt_summary: Fix pie chart missing failed states
response: Query was filtering by history table which missed some rows. Changed to show all jobs currently in Failed grouped by fail_type.

prompt_summary: Backfill applied history for failed jobs
response: Created backfill_applied_history.py inserting Applied history entries for Failed jobs that didn't have one.

prompt_summary: Fix pie chart to include both applied and failed states
response: Updated query to include jobs in Applied/Interviewed/Accepted/Failed that have Applied history. Shows current status or fail_type as outcome.

prompt_summary: Run backfill script to fix pie chart data
response: Provided command: python SearchCode/backfill_applied_history.py

prompt_summary: Replace CSS pie chart with SVG donut chart with total in center
response: Rebuilt PieChart using SVG circles with stroke-dasharray. Total number displayed in center via text elements. Drop shadow filter.

prompt_summary: Add drill-down modal on pie chart segments
response: Made SVG segments and legend items clickable. Opens modal showing filtered job list (title company location source) for clicked outcome. Click outside to dismiss.

prompt_summary: Fix anonymize on dashboard popup and recent activity
response: Passed anonymize prop to Dashboard and PieChart. Applied anonFn to company in drilldown modal recent activity table and focus card.

prompt_summary: Fix applied today showing 0 due to UTC timezone mismatch
response: Diagnosed UTC date vs EST local day mismatch. Created check_applied_today.py to verify. Led to Settings page for timezone.

prompt_summary: Add Settings page with timezone dropdown
response: Created settings table with key/value. Added GET/PATCH /settings endpoints. Built Settings page with timezone dropdown. Updated applied-today to use user timezone.

prompt_summary: Make timezone selection a dropdown instead of radio list
response: Replaced scrollable radio button list with single select element using Intl.supportedValuesOf('timeZone').

prompt_summary: Add happy/sad face widget for applications today
response: Added /stats/applied-today endpoint using user timezone. Built widget with bouncing emoji and count next to pie chart.

prompt_summary: Auto-record Applied history when moving directly to Failed
response: Updated PATCH status to insert Applied history entry when moving from Searched/Found or Researching to Failed.

prompt_summary: Geocode US states from Adzuna location using Nominatim
response: Added US_STATES dict _extract_state_from_area and _geocode_state using Nominatim API. Created backfill_states.py for existing rows. 1 req/sec rate limit.

prompt_summary: Write all prompts to CSV file in app_metadata folder
response: Created app_metadata/prompts.csv with sequence/date/prompt_summary/category for all 106 prompts in the conversation.

prompt_summary: Add Prompts Log tab to display prompts CSV in scrollable table
response: Added /prompts GET endpoint reading CSV. Built PromptsLog React page with filterable table and colour-coded category badges.

prompt_summary: Commit to appending prompts to CSV after every change
response: Agreed to append new line to prompts.csv with sequence/date/summary/category/response after every change going forward.

prompt_summary: Catch up prompts log with recent prompts
response: Appended missing entries 109-121 covering timezone dropdown happy face widget settings page and related fixes.

prompt_summary: Add response column to prompts CSV with more/less expander in UI
response: Added response as 5th CSV column. Updated C# parser to split on 5 commas. Built ResponseCell component with first-line preview and expandable full text.

prompt_summary: Backfill all responses in prompts CSV
response: Rewrote entire prompts.csv with detailed response summaries for all 111 entries.

prompt_summary: Remove response column from table - show full response in click-to-open modal instead
response: Removed Response column from PromptsLog table. Made rows clickable. Added modal overlay showing prompt + full response text. Click outside to dismiss. Styled with scrollable response area.

prompt_summary: Move prompts log from CSV to SQLite table
response: Added prompts_log table to C# startup. Updated /prompts endpoint to read from DB. Created import_prompts_to_db.py migration script to import CSV data. Keeps CSV as backup.

prompt_summary: Populate full verbatim responses for all prompts in SQLite table
response: Created 4 Python scripts to update prompts_log table with detailed responses for all 113 entries. Responses describe what was done in each step without code blocks.

prompt_summary: Add search_keywords setting for Fetch Adzuna Jobs default
response: Added search_keywords to settings table with default value. Settings page now has an editable text field that saves on blur. Fetch Adzuna modal reads the setting as its default keywords.

prompt_summary: Renamed github repo to Jobsearch-with-Kiro
response: No code changes needed - the app doesn't reference the repo name anywhere. Acknowledged the rename.

prompt_summary: Push code to GitHub repo Jobsearch-with-Kiro
response: Initialized git repo added .gitignore (excluding node_modules/bin/obj/.env but including jobs.db). Committed 64 files. Pushed to full-app branch since main had existing commits. PR link provided.

prompt_summary: Create sourcecode-stats branch with code stats table pie charts and new tab
response: Created sourcecode-stats branch. Added code_stats table to DB. Built scan_code_stats.py that walks workspace counting lines by file type. Added /code-stats API endpoint. Built CodeStats React page with two SVG donut charts (lines and files by language) plus breakdown table. Added as nav tab after Settings.

prompt_summary: Add Rescan button on Code Stats page to run scanner via .NET API
response: Added POST /code-stats/scan endpoint that executes scan_code_stats.py via py -3.14. Added Rescan button to Code Stats page header that triggers the scan and refreshes the data on success.

prompt_summary: Fix Rescan button not visible on Code Stats page
response: The early return for empty data was rendering before the button. Moved the button into the empty state view so it's always visible even when no stats exist yet.

prompt_summary: Fix applied-today not functioning on Dashboard
response: The LIKE query was comparing UTC timestamps against a local timezone date string which didn't match. Fixed by calculating start/end of today in user's timezone then converting to UTC for a proper range query (>= start AND < end).

prompt_summary: Can a C# console program spawn both services and stop on user input
response: Confirmed yes - a simple C# console app can start both dotnet run and npm run dev as child processes then wait for keypress to kill both using taskkill /T /F for process tree cleanup.

prompt_summary: Create branch to automate running the application
response: Created automate-startup branch. Built launcher/ C# console app that starts the API (dotnet run in webapp/api_cs) and React UI (npm run dev in webapp/client with OPENSSL_CONF cleared). Waits for Enter then kills both process trees. Run with: dotnet run --project launcher

prompt_summary: Test the launcher - provide the run command
response: Provided: dotnet run --project launcher from workspace root. Both services start and user presses Enter to stop.

prompt_summary: Add new prompts and responses to prompts log
response: Appended prompts 122-125 covering the launcher research creation testing and this documentation update.

prompt_summary: Create Code Map tab as empty placeholder
response: Created CodeMap.jsx with title and subtitle. Added to App.jsx nav and routing. Added basic CSS. Tab appears after Code Stats.

prompt_summary: Build Code Map page showing UI→API→SQL→Tables data flow
response: Created CodeMap.jsx with complete mapping of all 38 API endpoints showing UI page action endpoint HTTP method SQL operation and tables affected. Filterable by page method and table. Grid layout with colour-coded methods and SQL types. Table names as blue pills.

prompt_summary: Split monolithic Program.cs into separate controllers by business process and update Code Map
response: Split Program.cs into 9 controller files (Jobs Kanban Links Stats UsefulLinks Settings Prompts CodeStats Adzuna). Program.cs now only handles startup/init and calls extension methods. Updated Code Map with Controller column and filter dropdown. Build verified clean.

prompt_summary: Fix delete function on Job Search Results page
response: Delete was failing due to foreign key constraints - kanban_jobs references job_listings. Updated JobsController delete endpoint to cascade: delete kanban_notes then kanban_history then kanban_jobs then job_listings.

prompt_summary: Add button to delete all untouched Searched/Found jobs
response: Added DELETE /jobs/stale endpoint that finds kanban cards in Searched/Found with no history entries and cascades delete through notes/kanban/job_listings. Added red Clear Untouched button with confirmation dialog to Search Results header.

prompt_summary: Fix LinkedIn import failing for job 4405146667 - empty company
response: The a[href*=/company/] selector matched the logo link (no text) before the named link. Fixed by prioritizing data-tracking-control-name selector and adding fallback loop that skips empty-text links.

prompt_summary: Show red background on failed imports with error tooltip on hover
response: Added error_message column to job_links table. Updated LinksController to parse Python output and detect per-link failures (Skipped or no title). Processed table shows red background on failed rows with Failed badge and hover tooltip showing the error. Green OK badge on success.

prompt_summary: Show Already imported status with kanban lane for duplicate imports
response: Updated LinksController to check if URL already exists in job_listings before marking as error. Duplicates show 'Already imported - [lane]: [title]' in amber. True failures show red. New imports show green OK. Hover tooltip shows full message.

prompt_summary: Create bookmarklet for LinkedIn job URL extraction and bulk paste import
response: Created browser bookmarklet that extracts all /jobs/view/ URLs from current LinkedIn page and copies to clipboard. Updated Import Links input from single-line to multi-line textarea supporting bulk paste. Shows URL count. Added Bookmarklet component with drag-to-bookmarks-bar button and usage instructions.

prompt_summary: Add delete button to Searched/Found tiles and remove duplicate View link
response: Added delete button (X) to tiles in Searched/Found lane with confirmation dialog. Removed duplicate View Job link from expanded card body (kept only the one on collapsed tile). Delete cascades through kanban_notes/history/jobs.

prompt_summary: Replace bookmarklet with browser extension download and installation instructions
response: Replaced the drag-to-bookmark bookmarklet with extension info section. Shows extension folder location with installation steps (Chrome/Edge developer mode Load unpacked) and usage instructions in expandable details sections.
